FROM sales.orders

FROM billing.payments
WHERE captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  catalog.products.name AS product_name, 
  catalog.brands.name AS brand_name
FROM 
  catalog.products
LEFT JOIN 
  catalog.brands 
ON 
  catalog.products.brand_id = catalog.brands.id

SELECT 
    pr.id AS review_id,
    pr.product_id,
    pr.user_id,
    pr.rating,
    pr.title,
    pr.body,
    pr.is_verified_purchase,
    pr.is_approved,
    pr.helpful_count,
    pr.created_at AS review_created_at,
    pr.updated_at AS review_updated_at,
    p.name AS product_name
FROM 
    catalog.product_reviews pr
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON pr.product_id = p.id

SELECT 
  subscriptions.id AS subscription_id,
  subscriptions.public_id,
  subscriptions.tenant_id,
  subscriptions.user_id,
  subscriptions.status,
  subscriptions.currency_code,
  subscriptions.quantity,
  subscriptions.trial_ends_at,
  subscriptions.current_period_start,
  subscriptions.current_period_end,
  subscriptions.cancel_at_period_end,
  subscriptions.canceled_at,
  subscriptions.started_at,
  subscriptions.ended_at,
  subscriptions.metadata,
  subscriptions.created_at,
  subscriptions.updated_at,
  plans.name AS plan_name
FROM 
  billing.subscriptions
JOIN 
  billing.plans ON subscriptions.plan_id = plans.id

SELECT 
  sales.orders.id AS order_id,
  sales.orders.order_number,
  identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  sales.orders
JOIN 
  identity.users ON sales.orders.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT p.*
FROM catalog.products p
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1
  FROM catalog.product_reviews r
  WHERE r.product_id = p.id
)

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM billing.subscriptions s
JOIN billing.plans p ON s.plan_id = p.id
WHERE p.code = 'pro' AND s.status = 'active'

SELECT 
  orders.currency_code, 
  SUM(orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
  sales.orders
GROUP BY 
  orders.currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT p.id, p.name
FROM catalog.products p
JOIN catalog.product_reviews r ON p.id = r.product_id
GROUP BY p.id, p.name
HAVING AVG(r.rating) > 4

SELECT u.*
FROM identity.users u
JOIN (
  SELECT user_id
  FROM sales.orders
  GROUP BY user_id
  HAVING COUNT(*) > 3
) o ON u.id = o.user_id

SELECT 
    countries.name AS country_name,
    SUM(orders.grand_total) AS total_revenue
FROM 
    sales.orders
JOIN 
    geo.countries ON orders.shipping_address_id = countries.id
GROUP BY 
    countries.name
ORDER BY 
    total_revenue DESC

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id, 
    p.name AS product_name, 
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_units_sold
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    sales.order_items oi ON p.id = oi.product_variant_id
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    total_units_sold DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN sales.orders o ON pr.payment_id = o.id
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id

SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT o.user_id) AS user_count
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN geo.addresses a ON o.shipping_address_id = a.id OR o.billing_address_id = a.id
JOIN geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
WHERE c.name = 'Germany'

SELECT 
  p.code AS plan_code, 
  COUNT(s.id) AS active_subscriptions_count
FROM 
  billing.plans p
JOIN 
  billing.subscriptions s ON p.id = s.plan_id
WHERE 
  s.status = 'active'
GROUP BY 
  p.code

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', placed_at) AS month, 
  COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM 
  sales.orders
WHERE 
  placed_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '12 months'
GROUP BY 
  month
ORDER BY 
  month

SELECT 
  t.id AS tenant_id,
  t.name AS tenant_name,
  SUM(o.grand_total) AS total_revenue,
  RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(o.grand_total) DESC) AS revenue_rank
FROM 
  identity.tenants t
JOIN 
  sales.orders o ON t.id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
  t.id, t.name
ORDER BY 
  total_revenue DESC

SELECT AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at)) / 86400) AS average_days_to_resolve
FROM support.tickets
WHERE resolved_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM sales.orders o
JOIN identity.users u ON o.user_id = u.id
WHERE o.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT 
    c.id, 
    c.name, 
    COUNT(pc.product_id) AS product_count
FROM 
    catalog.categories c
JOIN 
    catalog.product_categories pc ON c.id = pc.category_id
GROUP BY 
    c.id, c.name
ORDER BY 
    product_count DESC
LIMIT 3

SELECT SUM(grand_total) AS total_revenue_eur
FROM sales.orders
WHERE currency_code = 'EUR' AND placed_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE cancelled_at IS NOT NULL)::decimal / COUNT(*) AS cancelled_fraction
FROM 
    sales.orders

SELECT * 
FROM crm.accounts 
WHERE employee_count > 100

SELECT 
    s.plan_id,
    AVG(o.grand_total) AS average_order_value
FROM 
    billing.subscriptions s
JOIN 
    sales.orders o
ON 
    s.user_id = o.user_id AND s.tenant_id = o.tenant_id
GROUP BY 
    s.plan_id

FROM billing.invoices
WHERE paid_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY status

FROM analytics.web_sessions 
WHERE is_bounce = TRUE

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM pricing.coupons 
WHERE status = 'active'

FROM billing.payment_refunds
WHERE status = 'successful'

SELECT COUNT(*) AS leads_converted_to_customers
FROM crm.leads
WHERE converted_account_id IS NOT NULL

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS notification_count
FROM comms.notifications
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
  DATE_TRUNC('month', analytics.events.occurred_at) AS month,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  month
ORDER BY 
  month

SELECT 
  status, 
  COUNT(*) AS failed_job_runs_count
FROM 
  ops.job_runs
WHERE 
  status = 'failed'
GROUP BY 
  status

SELECT 
    (COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE bounced_at IS NOT NULL)::decimal / COUNT(*)) AS bounce_fraction
FROM 
    marketing.campaign_messages

SELECT 
  currency_code, 
  SUM(total) AS total_invoiced_amount
FROM 
  billing.invoices
GROUP BY 
  currency_code

SELECT tenant_id, COUNT(*) AS open_opportunities_count
FROM crm.opportunities
WHERE is_closed = FALSE
GROUP BY tenant_id

SELECT 
  comms.notifications.id AS notification_id,
  identity.users.email AS user_email
FROM 
  comms.notifications
JOIN 
  identity.users 
ON 
  comms.notifications.user_id = identity.users.id

SELECT 
  opp.id AS opportunity_id,
  opp.name AS opportunity_name,
  pipe.name AS pipeline_name
FROM 
  crm.opportunities AS opp
JOIN 
  crm.pipelines AS pipe
ON 
  opp.pipeline_id = pipe.id
AND 
  opp.tenant_id = pipe.tenant_id

SELECT COUNT(*) AS refund_count
FROM billing.payment_refunds pr
JOIN billing.payments p ON pr.payment_id = p.id
WHERE p.captured_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT c.id, c.code
FROM pricing.coupons c
LEFT JOIN pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
WHERE cr.coupon_id IS NULL

SELECT 
  c.code AS coupon_code, 
  SUM(cr.discount_amount) AS total_redeemed_discount
FROM 
  pricing.coupons c
JOIN 
  pricing.coupon_redemptions cr ON c.id = cr.coupon_id
GROUP BY 
  c.code

SELECT 
    sa.id AS agent_id, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.support_agents sa
JOIN 
    support.csat_responses cr ON sa.user_id = cr.rated_agent_id
GROUP BY 
    sa.id
HAVING 
    AVG(cr.score) < 3

SELECT 
    c.name AS campaign_name, 
    COUNT(cm.id) AS message_count
FROM 
    marketing.campaigns c
JOIN 
    marketing.campaign_messages cm ON c.id = cm.campaign_id
GROUP BY 
    c.name
HAVING 
    COUNT(cm.id) > 100

SELECT 
    p.id AS pipeline_id,
    p.name AS pipeline_name,
    COUNT(o.id) AS won_opportunities_count
FROM 
    crm.pipelines p
LEFT JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON p.id = o.pipeline_id AND o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    won_opportunities_count DESC

WITH monthly_debits AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', occurred_at) AS month,
    SUM(amount) AS monthly_debit_total
  FROM
    billing.ledger_entries
  WHERE
    direction = 'debit'
  GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', occurred_at)
  ORDER BY
    date_trunc('month', occurred_at)
)
SELECT
  month,
  monthly_debit_total,
  SUM(monthly_debit_total) OVER (ORDER BY month) AS running_total
FROM
  monthly_debits

SELECT event_name, COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM analytics.events
GROUP BY event_name
ORDER BY event_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    sa.display_name, 
    AVG(cr.score) AS average_score
FROM 
    support.csat_responses cr
JOIN 
    support.support_agents sa 
ON 
    cr.rated_agent_id = sa.user_id
GROUP BY 
    sa.display_name

SELECT 
    w.name AS warehouse_name, 
    COUNT(sm.id) AS stock_movement_count
FROM 
    inventory.stock_movements sm
JOIN 
    inventory.stock_locations sl ON sm.stock_location_id = sl.id
JOIN 
    inventory.warehouses w ON sl.warehouse_id = w.id
GROUP BY 
    w.name

SELECT u.email
FROM identity.users u
WHERE u.id IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT cm.user_id
    FROM marketing.campaign_messages cm
    WHERE cm.opened_at IS NOT NULL
)
AND u.id NOT IN (
    SELECT DISTINCT o.user_id
    FROM sales.orders o
)

SELECT 
    c.name AS country_name,
    SUM(r.refund_total) AS total_refunded_amount
FROM 
    sales.returns r
JOIN 
    sales.orders o ON r.order_id = o.id
JOIN 
    geo.addresses a ON o.shipping_address_id = a.id
JOIN 
    geo.countries c ON a.country_id = c.id
GROUP BY 
    c.name

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM comms.notifications n
JOIN identity.users u ON n.user_id = u.id
WHERE n.tenant_id = u.tenant_id

SELECT DISTINCT u.email
FROM billing.plans p
JOIN billing.subscriptions s ON p.id = s.plan_id
JOIN support.tickets t ON s.user_id = t.requester_user_id
JOIN identity.users u ON s.user_id = u.id
WHERE p.name = 'enterprise'
  AND s.status = 'active'
  AND u.deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) AS abandoned_baskets_count
FROM sales.carts
WHERE abandoned_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sales.fulfillments 
WHERE delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM catalog.product_variants 
WHERE is_active = TRUE

WITH po_expected_quantities AS (
  SELECT 
    po.id AS purchase_order_id,
    SUM(pol.quantity) AS total_expected_quantity
  FROM 
    inventory.purchase_orders po
  JOIN 
    inventory.purchase_order_lines pol ON po.id = pol.purchase_order_id
  GROUP BY 
    po.id
),
po_received_quantities AS (
  SELECT 
    po.id AS purchase_order_id,
    SUM(rl.quantity_received) AS total_received_quantity
  FROM 
    inventory.purchase_orders po
  JOIN 
    inventory.inbound_receipts ir ON po.id = ir.purchase_order_id
  JOIN 
    inventory.receipt_lines rl ON ir.id = rl.inbound_receipt_id
  GROUP BY 
    po.id
)
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) AS fully_received_po_count
FROM 
  po_expected_quantities peq
JOIN 
  po_received_quantities prq ON peq.purchase_order_id = prq.purchase_order_id
WHERE 
  peq.total_expected_quantity = prq.total_received_quantity

SELECT COUNT(*) AS rejected_attempts
FROM identity.login_attempts
WHERE succeeded = false

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM sales.returns 
WHERE status = 'approved'

SELECT COUNT(*) 
FROM comms.email_log 
WHERE status = 'failed'

SELECT AVG(duration_seconds) AS average_duration
FROM analytics.page_views

SELECT 
  gateway, 
  SUM(amount) AS total_captured_amount
FROM 
  billing.payments
WHERE 
  captured_at IS NOT NULL
GROUP BY 
  gateway

SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS order_count
FROM sales.orders
GROUP BY status

SELECT 
  EXTRACT(HOUR FROM analytics.events.occurred_at) AS hour_of_day,
  COUNT(*) AS event_count
FROM 
  analytics.events
GROUP BY 
  hour_of_day
ORDER BY 
  event_count DESC
LIMIT 1

SELECT 
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE status = 'sent')::decimal / COUNT(*) AS success_fraction
FROM 
    comms.email_log

SELECT ticket_id, COUNT(*) AS message_count
FROM support.ticket_messages
GROUP BY ticket_id
HAVING COUNT(*) >= 8

SELECT 
  order_id, 
  SUM(line_total) AS total_line_value
FROM 
  sales.order_items
GROUP BY 
  order_id
ORDER BY 
  total_line_value DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT 
  sales.shipments.tracking_number, 
  sales.orders.order_number
FROM 
  sales.shipments
JOIN 
  sales.fulfillments ON sales.shipments.fulfillment_id = sales.fulfillments.id
JOIN 
  sales.orders ON sales.fulfillments.order_id = sales.orders.id
WHERE 
  sales.shipments.delivered_at IS NOT NULL

SELECT 
  c.id AS contact_id,
  c.first_name,
  c.last_name,
  a.name AS account_name
FROM 
  crm.contacts c
LEFT JOIN 
  crm.accounts a ON c.account_id = a.id

SELECT 
  pm.kind, 
  COUNT(p.id) AS captured_payments_count
FROM 
  billing.payments p
JOIN 
  billing.payment_methods pm ON p.payment_method_id = pm.id
WHERE 
  p.status = 'captured'
GROUP BY 
  pm.kind

SELECT 
    b.name AS brand_name,
    SUM(oi.quantity) AS total_quantity_sold
FROM 
    sales.order_items oi
JOIN 
    catalog.products p ON oi.product_variant_id = p.id
JOIN 
    catalog.brands b ON p.brand_id = b.id
GROUP BY 
    b.name
ORDER BY 
    total_quantity_sold DESC

SELECT 
  w.name, 
  COUNT(f.id) AS fulfillment_count
FROM 
  inventory.warehouses w
JOIN 
  sales.fulfillments f ON w.id = f.warehouse_id
WHERE 
  f.status IN ('shipped', 'delivered')
GROUP BY 
  w.name
ORDER BY 
  fulfillment_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT 
    pr.currency_code, 
    SUM(pr.amount) AS total_succeeded_refund_amount
FROM 
    billing.payment_refunds pr
WHERE 
    pr.status = 'succeeded'
GROUP BY 
    pr.currency_code

SELECT 
  o.user_id,
  o.placed_at,
  o.grand_total,
  SUM(o.grand_total) OVER (PARTITION BY o.user_id ORDER BY o.placed_at) AS running_total
FROM 
  sales.orders o
ORDER BY 
  o.user_id, 
  o.placed_at
LIMIT 50

WITH monthly_order_counts AS (
  SELECT
    date_trunc('month', placed_at) AS order_month,
    COUNT(*) AS order_count
  FROM
    sales.orders
  WHERE
    placed_at IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY
    date_trunc('month', placed_at)
  ORDER BY
    order_month
)
SELECT
  order_month,
  order_count,
  order_count - LAG(order_count, 1) OVER (ORDER BY order_month) AS change_from_previous_month
FROM
  monthly_order_counts

SELECT 
    o.owner_user_id, 
    COUNT(*) AS won_deals_count
FROM 
    crm.deals d
JOIN 
    crm.opportunities o ON d.opportunity_id = o.id
WHERE 
    o.is_won = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    o.owner_user_id
ORDER BY 
    won_deals_count DESC
LIMIT 5

SELECT COUNT(*)
FROM identity.users u
WHERE u.id NOT IN (
  SELECT DISTINCT la.user_id
  FROM identity.login_attempts la
  WHERE la.succeeded = true AND la.user_id IS NOT NULL
)

SELECT 
    p.id AS product_id, 
    p.name AS product_name, 
    COUNT(pr.id) AS approved_review_count
FROM 
    catalog.products p
JOIN 
    catalog.product_reviews pr ON p.id = pr.product_id
WHERE 
    pr.is_approved = TRUE
GROUP BY 
    p.id, p.name
ORDER BY 
    approved_review_count DESC
LIMIT 10
